businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform — transforming from core US defense/intelligence partner to commercial AI powerhouse
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds software platforms that analyze and integrate complex data. Explosive commercial growth since AIP (AI Platform) launch. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56.18%), net income $1.63B (+251.59%). Closed at $152.67 (-0.34%) on 3/5, slight pullback after prior day's surge. Motley Fool asks: best buy in March? Forward P/E 100x+ warning. P/E 243x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts: US DoD, CIA, NSA — software licensing and maintenance
Commercial segment: AIP-powered enterprise AI analytics subscription — US commercial revenue +137% YoY
International government: NATO allies and Five Eyes partner contracts
keyProducts: AIP (AI Platform): Connects LLMs to enterprise data for AI analytics
Gotham: Government/defense data analysis and decision support
Foundry: Enterprise data integration and analytics platform
Apollo: Software deployment and management automation
Maven: US DoD AI operational support system

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Government security clearance (Top Secret/SCI), 20-year defense/intelligence relationships, AIP-driven enterprise AI platform expansion as core moats.

moats.description: Top Secret/SCI clearance. Extremely difficult for competitors to obtain.
Gotham/Foundry deeply integrated into customer data infrastructure. Very high replacement costs.
AIP bootcamps rapidly expanding enterprise customer base. More usage → better models.

competitors.detail: Azure AI services targeting government and enterprise markets

competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Much smaller scale vs PLTR

analystOpinions.notableComment: 21 analysts, Buy consensus. Rosenblatt $200, Citigroup $260 high target. Valuation debate continues at Forward P/E 100x+.

risks.title: Extreme valuation — P/E 243x, Forward P/E 116x
risks.description: Significant correction inevitable if growth decelerates. PEG 2.49 also in overvalued territory.

risks.title: Government budget dependency
risks.description: High US government contract concentration makes it vulnerable to budget cuts or policy changes.

risks.title: CEO insider selling
risks.description: Alex Karp CEO's ongoing stock sales negatively impact market sentiment.

risks.title: Commercial competition intensifying
risks.description: Competition from Snowflake, Databricks, Microsoft Azure AI.

risks.title: Share dilution
risks.description: SBC driving 4.67% annual share count increase. Existing shareholder dilution.

buyReasons.title: Agentic AI revolution's Logic Layer — structural growth
buyReasons.rationale: Positioned as Enterprise OS. AI logic layer dominance provides long-term growth foundation.

buyReasons.title: US commercial revenue explodes +137% YoY
buyReasons.rationale: AIP bootcamp accelerating enterprise conversions. Rule of 40 score 127%.

buyReasons.title: Rosenblatt $200 upgrade — momentum catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Major analyst upgrade improving market sentiment.

buyReasons.title: Net cash $6.95B — financial fortress
buyReasons.rationale: Debt-free with ample cash. Aggressive investment and M&A capacity.

overallOpinion: Palantir is positioning itself as the Logic Layer of the Agentic AI revolution, strengthening its Enterprise OS vision.
FY2025 revenue +56%, net income +252% — growth is overwhelming. But P/E 243x and Forward P/E 116x remain the biggest overhang.
Both 50-day and 200-day SMAs slightly breached, but RSI 57 shows recovery momentum. Consolidating after 3/4 defense rally.
The valuation debate continues. Justifiable if growth rates persist, but sharp correction risk if deceleration materializes.
